1. śi (accord. to some = √śo) cl. 3. P. śiśāti (Impv. śiśīhi, śādhi), to grant, bestow,  RV.  (cf.  Nir. v, 23 );
to present or satisfy with (instr.),  ib. ;
cl. 5. P. Ā. ( Dhātup. xxvii, 3 ) śinoti, śinute (p. śiṣāya, śiṣye; aor. aśaiṣīt, aśeṣṭa fut. śeṣyati, ˚te),
to sharpen.

śi 5 U. śinoti, śinute

3 To excite.
